cycle_reasoning: Cycle 21. CTO has a significant backlog (12 issues), so no new CTO issues are created. Prioritizing the replacement of mock APIs (#524-#527) and the 2026 Theme Pack (#541). QA is assigned to test CTO's output. Product is assigned for roadmap maintenance. Designer is assigned (Cycle 21 is divisible by 3) to review UI/UX. Legal is assigned (Cycle 21 is divisible by 7) to handle the new audio data privacy requirements in issue #544.
